you haven't seen us
beyond the fanfare 
of your seizing of control 
we awaken each day and 
go to work
in your lack of imagination
you don't see our struggles
or what we need to keep going
that which is unrecognizable 
to the disconnected privilege
and slick misdirection of your slogans
